fixtures._comment: Voice probe: the sample-audio button synchronously injects 'What is the weather in Tokyo?' into the composer (no /transcribe round trip), then the runner presses Enter. Single-turn probe — matched on the stable userMessage + context (no turnIndex gate needed).

match.userMessage: What is the weather in Tokyo?

response.content: The weather in Tokyo is currently 22°C with partly cloudy skies and light easterly winds.
